# fishr

The goal of fishr is to implement a phony R package as part of a
training program offered by Andy and Sam through TESA.

## Installation

You can install the development version of fishr from
[GitHub](https://github.com/) with:

``` r
# install.packages("pak")
pak::pak("ricardd/fishr")
```

## Example

This is a basic example which shows you how to solve a common problem:

``` r
library(fishr)
## basic example code
cpue(100,50)
#> [1] 2
```

# Package index

## All functions

- [`biomass_index()`](https://ricardd.github.io/fishr/reference/biomass_index.md)
  : Calculate biomass index
- [`cpue()`](https://ricardd.github.io/fishr/reference/cpue.md) :
  Calculate catch per unit of effort (CPUE)
